title: Guess what's in my lunchbox
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - We visited the Grade 1s at...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Video","html":"Gallery\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - We visited the Grade 1s at Erika Primary School in Extension 13 during their first day of school this week.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - We visited the Grade 1s at Erika Primary School in Extension 13 during their first day of school this week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They all looked neat and tidy in their grey and red uniforms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The girls' hair was beautifully done for their first day of big school.","html":"The girls' hair was beautifully done for their first day of big school."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a gallery here: Guess what's in my lunchbox"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was breaktime when the Advertiser visited and the children were had a variety of lunches, which included polony sandwiches, chicken, Russian sausages, grapes, biscuits and juice.","html":"It was breaktime when the Advertiser visited and the children were had a variety of lunches, which included polony sandwiches, chicken, Russian sausages, grapes, biscuits and juice."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a video below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
